# vector: hello_resp
# HELLO_RESP：版本、build_hash、固件名、tick_hz、能力位、项目名与构建时间
# raw  = COBS 编码前帧 (ver|type|flags|seq|len|payload|crc32c, 全 LE)
# wire = COBS(raw) + 0x00 定界符（SCI 链路实际字节）
raw: 5681000100480006000b00ebb6cc080a00000076696577657232303030000000000000204e00007f0000007068617365342d64656d6f00000000000000000000000000000000000000000000d8356a208b5179
wire: 035681020102480206020b06ebb6cc080a01010b76696577657232303030010101010103204e01027f01010c7068617365342d64656d6f01010101010101010101010101010101010101010108d8356a208b517900
